original_image_tags: a beige, aged envelope with two punched holes on the left margin. The envelope has a partially visible return address or note in the upper right. The main address is handwritten in blue ink, with an additional note at the bottom left.

elements.description: A single off-white envelope or piece of paper with two dark punch holes on the left edge. It features handwritten cursive text in blue ink. The central text reads 'Mr. J. Edgar Hoover' on the first line and 'Washington, D.C.' on the second line. Near the bottom left corner, additional handwritten text reads 'Personal attention.'

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (an off-white/beige envelope with two punch holes on the left and blue ink handwriting), but Description B adds specific quoted text not present in Description A.
